requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3与危险货物文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3與危險貨物文件

summary.en: Lithium-ion cells and batteries shipped to Serbia normally need UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3 transport test evidence and the related test summary before air, sea, road, or multimodal transport. Transport compliance is separate from Serbian product conformity, ISS evidence, AERS project approval, and EMS grid interconnection.
summary.zh: 运往塞尔维亚的锂离子电芯和电池通常需要具备《联合国试验和标准手册》第III部分第38.3小节运输测试证据及相应测试概要，方可进行航空、海运、公路或多式联运。运输合规独立于塞尔维亚产品符合性、ISS证据、AERS项目批准及EMS并网。
summary.zht: 運往塞爾維亞的鋰離子電芯和電池通常需要具備《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第III部分第38.3小節運輸測試證據及對應測試概要，方可進行空運、海運、公路或多式聯運。運輸合規獨立於塞爾維亞產品符合性、ISS證據、AERS項目批准及EMS併網。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, subsection 38.3
UN Model Regulations dangerous-goods framework for lithium batteries

summary.en: Chinese exporters often hold UN 38.3 reports and transport-condition identification documents issued for outbound lithium-battery shipments. These documents can support Serbia-bound shipment planning, but the shipper must still match the exact cell, battery, module, state of charge, packaging, dangerous-goods declaration, and modal transport rules for the actual route.
summary.zh: 中国出口商通常持有用于锂电池出口运输的UN 38.3报告及运输条件鉴定文件。这些文件可支持发往塞尔维亚的运输安排，但托运人仍须确保实际路线下的电芯、电池、模组、荷电状态、包装、危险货物申报及运输方式规则逐项匹配。
summary.zht: 中國出口商通常持有用於鋰電池出口運輸的UN 38.3報告及運輸條件鑑定文件。這些文件可支持發往塞爾維亞的運輸安排，但託運人仍須確保實際路線下的電芯、電池、模組、荷電狀態、包裝、危險貨物申報及運輸方式規則逐項匹配。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 test report and lithium-battery test summary
China outbound dangerous-goods transport documentation for lithium batteries

gap.en: A BESS safety certificate does not satisfy dangerous-goods transport documentation. Exporters should prepare model-specific UN 38.3 reports, test summaries, SDS, packing instructions, battery net mass information, state-of-charge controls, and carrier-required declarations for the selected route to Serbia.
gap.zh: BESS安全证书不能替代危险货物运输文件。出口商应为发往塞尔维亚的具体路线准备型号对应的UN 38.3报告、测试概要、SDS、包装说明、电池净重信息、荷电状态控制以及承运人要求的申报文件。
gap.zht: BESS安全證書不能替代危險貨物運輸文件。出口商應為發往塞爾維亞的具體路線準備型號對應的UN 38.3報告、測試概要、SDS、包裝說明、電池淨重資訊、荷電狀態控制以及承運人要求的申報文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated lithium-battery transport where UN dangerous-goods rules are incorporated by the selected transport mode and route
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for regulated outbound lithium-battery transport documentation; not a substitute for destination product or grid approval

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 is a shipment gate, not a Serbia BESS market approval. Match the transport test summary and dangerous-goods package to the exact shipped battery configuration and transport route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3是运输门槛，不是塞尔维亚BESS市场准入批准。应将运输测试概要和危险货物包装与实际发运的电池配置及运输路线逐项匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3是運輸門檻，不是塞爾維亞BESS市場准入批准。應將運輸測試概要和危險貨物包裝與實際發運的電池配置及運輸路線逐項匹配。
